questionHtml:
Which process does not take place in the stroma of chloroplasts?

A. Synthesis of carbohydrates

B. Fixation of carbon

C. Reduction of NADP

D. Synthesis of ribulose bisphosphate

meta.title: Which process does not take place in the stroma of chloroplasts? A. Synthesis of carbohydrates B. Fixation of carbon C. Reduction of NADP D. Synthesis of ribulose bisphosphate
